sentences.target: Ich spüre die Kälte im Bus.

translations.de: Ich spüre die Kälte im Bus.
translations.en: I feel the cold on the bus.
translations.es: Siento el frío en el autobús.
translations.fr: Je sens le froid dans le bus.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在公交车上觉得很冷。
translations.vi: Tôi cảm thấy lạnh trên xe buýt.
translations.nl: Ik voel de kou in de bus.
translations.hi: मुझे बस में ठंड लग रही है.
translations.da: Jeg kan mærke kulden i bussen.
translations.ja: バスの中で寒さを感じる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular; transitive, taking the accusative object 'die Kälte'.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Kälte'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative direct object of 'spüre'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'), selects dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition 'im', indicating location.

sentences.target: Die Kälte macht mir heute echt zu schaffen.
sentences.reading: /diː ˈkɛltə maxt miːɐ̯ ˈhɔʏtə ɛçt tsuː ˈʃafən/

translations.de: Die Kälte macht mir heute echt zu schaffen.
translations.ipa: /diː ˈkɛltə maxt miːɐ̯ ˈhɔʏtə ɛçt tsuː ˈʃafən/
translations.en: The cold is really getting to me today.
translations.es: Hoy el frío me está pegando fuerte.
translations.fr: Le froid me pèse vraiment aujourd'hui.
translations.it: Oggi il freddo mi dà davvero fastidio.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天这冷真让我受不了。
translations.yue: 今日啲凍真係令我受唔住。
translations.pt: Hoje o frio está me pegando de verdade.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cái lạnh làm tôi mệt quá.
translations.nl: De kou valt me vandaag echt zwaar.
translations.hi: आज ठंड सच में मुझे बहुत परेशान कर रही है.
translations.pl: Dziś zimno naprawdę daje mi się we znaki.
translations.el: Το κρύο σήμερα με ταλαιπωρεί πραγματικά.
translations.nb: Kulden tar virkelig på i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini dingin benar-benar berat buatku.
translations.sv: Kylan tar verkligen på mig i dag.
translations.cs: Dnes mě ta zima fakt zmáhá.
translations.da: Kulden går mig virkelig på i dag.
translations.fi: Kylmä koettelee minua tänään oikein kunnolla.
translations.ja: 今日は寒さが本当にこたえる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject 'Kälte'.
Common noun, feminine; grammatical subject.
Finite verb, present tense 3rd person singular; causative predicate taking dative 'mir' and the idiomatic infinitival complement 'zu schaffen'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular dative; indirect object/experiencer.
Temporal adverb; sets the time frame.
Degree adverb; intensifier modifying the predicate.
Infinitival marker; links to 'schaffen' in the fixed expression 'zu schaffen (machen)'.
Infinitive verb; part of the idiomatic non-finite complement 'zu schaffen' governed by 'macht'.

sentences.target: Wegen der Kälte bleibe ich heute zu Hause.
sentences.reading: /ˈveːgən deːɐ̯ ˈkɛltə ˈblaɪbə ɪç ˈhɔʏtə tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/

translations.de: Wegen der Kälte bleibe ich heute zu Hause.
translations.ipa: /ˈveːgən deːɐ̯ ˈkɛltə ˈblaɪbə ɪç ˈhɔʏtə tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə/
translations.en: Because of the cold, I’m staying home today.
translations.es: Hoy me quedo en casa por el frío.
translations.fr: À cause du froid, je reste chez moi aujourd'hui.
translations.it: A causa del freddo, oggi resto a casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 因为天冷，我今天待在家里。
translations.yue: 因為好凍，我今日留喺屋企。
translations.ru: Из-за холода я сегодня остаюсь дома.
translations.pt: Por causa do frio, hoje vou ficar en casa.
translations.he: בגלל הקור אני נשאר בבית היום.
translations.vi: Vì lạnh nên hôm nay tôi ở nhà.
translations.ar: بسبب البرد سأبقى في البيت اليوم.
translations.nl: Door de kou blijf ik vandaag thuis.
translations.uk: Через холод я сьогодні залишаюся вдома.
translations.hu: A hideg miatt ma otthon maradok.
translations.hi: ठंड की वजह से मैं आज घर पर रहूँगा.
translations.pl: Przez zimno zostaję dziś w domu.
translations.el: Λόγω του κρύου μένω σήμερα στο σπίτι.
translations.nb: På grunn av kulden blir jeg hjemme i dag.
translations.id: Karena dingin, hari ini aku di rumah saja.
translations.sv: På grund av kylan stannar jag hemma i dag.
translations.ro: Din cauza frigului, astăzi stau acasă.
translations.da: På grund af kulden bliver jeg hjemme i dag.
translations.ja: 寒いので今日は家にいる。

tokens.explanation: Preposition meaning 'because of'; governs the genitive; introduces a causal prepositional phrase.
Definite article, feminine genitive singular; determiner of 'Kälte' as the object of 'wegen'.
Common noun, feminine; genitive object of the preposition 'Wegen'.
Finite main verb, present tense 1st person singular; intransitive predicate.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'bleibe'.
Temporal adverb; situates the event in time.
Preposition selecting the dative 'Hause' in the fixed locution 'zu Hause' meaning 'at home'.
Noun in dative form used idiomatically in 'zu Hause'; denotes location.

sentences.target: Die Kälte hält die Kinder drinnen.

translations.de: Die Kälte hält die Kinder drinnen.
translations.en: The cold keeps the kids indoors.
translations.es: El frío hace que los niños se queden dentro.
translations.fr: Le froid garde les enfants à l'intérieur.
translations.it: Il freddo tiene i bambini in casa.
translations.zh-Hans: 寒冷让孩子们待在室内。
translations.yue: 凍令啲小朋友留喺室內。
translations.pt: O frio mantém as crianças dentro de casa.
translations.vi: Cái lạnh khiến bọn trẻ phải ở trong nhà.
translations.nl: De kou houdt de kinderen binnen.
translations.hu: A hideg bent tartja a gyerekeket.
translations.hi: ठंड की वजह से बच्चे अंदर रहते हैं.
translations.el: Το κρύο κρατά τα παιδιά μέσα.
translations.id: Dingin membuat anak-anak tetap di dalam rumah.
translations.ro: Frigul îi ține pe copii înăuntru.
translations.ja: 寒さのせいで子どもたちは家の中にいる。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject 'Kälte'.
Common noun, feminine; grammatical subject.
Finite verb, present tense 3rd person singular; transitive predicate meaning 'to keep/hold'.
Definite article, plural accusative; determiner of 'Kinder' as direct object.
Common noun, plural; accusative direct object of 'hält'.
Adverb indicating interior location; resultative/adverbial complement specifying where the children are kept.

Die Kälte hält die Kinder drinnen.

The cold is really getting to me today.

es: Siento el frío en el autobús.
Hoy el frío me está pegando fuerte.
Hoy me quedo en casa por el frío.
El frío hace que los niños se queden dentro.

Le froid me pèse vraiment aujourd'hui.
À cause du froid, je reste chez moi aujourd'hui.
Le froid garde les enfants à l'intérieur.

A causa del freddo, oggi resto a casa.
Il freddo tiene i bambini in casa.

Hôm nay cái lạnh làm tôi mệt quá.

Cái lạnh khiến bọn trẻ phải ở trong nhà.

hu: A hideg miatt ma otthon maradok.
